name: Greater Aberrant Mark
description: You increase your Constitution score by 1. Your Aberrant Fortitude die increases to 1d6 and you regain its use on a short or long rest. When you cast a cantrip, you can expend 1 or 2 Hit Dice to gain temporary hit points equal to the roll plus your Constitution modifier and deal force damage equal to the roll to a creature within 30 feet. You can use this a number of times equal to your proficiency bonus per long rest.
